about: Report a documentation issue or suggest an improvement

---

## Location

Which page, section, or file needs attention?

## What is the issue?

- [ ] Missing documentation
- [ ] Incorrect or outdated information
- [ ] Typo or formatting problem
- [ ] Unclear explanation
- [ ] Missing code example

## Description

A clear and concise description of the documentation issue or improvement.

## Suggested Change

If you have a specific suggestion, describe it here.

## Additional Context

Any links, references, or screenshots that help illustrate the issue.
